description: The 'Magic' that exists outside of physics

offense.effect: Fires beams of raw, violet data that rewrite the target's existence, bypassing physical armor to delete their Hit Points directly, or binding them with runic chains

defense.effect: Writes sub-routines that counter enemy spells, create wards that forbid entry to supernatural creatures, or shield yourself in geometric force fields

utility.effect: Summons entities from the database of other planes, teleports across vast distances via the network, or reads any language by accessing the universal lexicon
